sentences.english: I go to the convenience store near my school almost every day.
sentences.korean: 거의 매일 학교 근처 편의점에 가요.

sentences.english: I usually buy a triangle kimbap and a banana milk.
Sometimes I get a cup of instant noodles when I am very hungry.
sentences.korean: 매우 배고플 때는 가끔 컵라면을 사먹어요.

sentences.english: Korean convenience stores have so many delicious options.
sentences.korean: 한국 편의점에는 맛있는 선택지가 정말 많아요.

sentences.english: My foreign friends are always amazed by how good the food is.
sentences.korean: 외국인 친구들은 음식이 얼마나 맛있는지 항상 놀라요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
